summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive items were present, and no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is supported by the hydrated evidence and job gates.

actions.reason: Standalone maintainer-review PR with useful code and no duplicate/superseded/low-signal evidence in this inventory shard.
Standalone PR awaiting author/maintainer workflow; not a duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Standalone focused fix PR; no hydrated evidence supports closure, and merge/fix actions are outside this plan-mode job.
Standalone PR with failing proof and waiting-on-author signal; keep out of dedupe/closeout automation.
Standalone feature/fix PR with failed proof and waiting-on-author signal; no safe close, merge, or fix action is allowed by this job.
